flashcards.front: What is the length of an IPv6 address?
What is the purpose of the Flow Label field in the IPv6 header?
flashcards.back: To identify a flow of packets

flashcards.front: What is the maximum length of the payload in an IPv6 datagram?
What is the purpose of the Hop-by-Hop Options Header in IPv6?
flashcards.back: To specify options that need to be processed by every device along the path

flashcards.front: What is the main difference between IPv4 and IPv6 datagrams?
flashcards.back: IPv6 datagrams are larger than IPv4 datagrams, have a longer header, and use a different address format
